steps.label: What They Do
steps.body:
Bitmovin is a video infrastructure company offering Live Encoder, VOD Encoder, Player, and Analytics — covering the full streaming lifecycle. They built the world's first commercial adaptive streaming player and the first software-defined cloud encoder.

Reference customers: BBC, Hulu, fuboTV, OneFootball. Their per-title and per-scene optimization (AI Scene Analysis) cuts storage and CDN cost by 30–55%.

steps.label: How They Run on Akamai
steps.body:
Both Live Encoder and VOD Encoder run natively on Akamai Cloud. Bitmovin's Cloud Connect deploys encoding into customer-owned Akamai infrastructure. Pre-integrated with:

- Akamai Object Storage (S3-generic API, V4 signing) for source/output
- Akamai Media Services Live (MSL4) for ingest
- Akamai CDN for delivery
- EdgeWorkers for personalisation, A/B routing

Reducing data transfer out (DTO) by up to 94% vs. hyperscalers.

steps.label: When To Position
steps.body: Bitmovin is the natural choice when a customer wants a single vendor for encoder + player + analytics — fewer integration points, one support contract. OneFootball is the canonical reference: outgrew their old infrastructure at ~1,000 matches/month, picked Bitmovin Live Encoder + Akamai Cloud, deployed in two weeks.
"Bitmovin = encoder + player + analytics, all on Akamai. One vendor for the streaming software stack, deploy in two weeks."

quiz.question: What's the cost-saving claim of running Bitmovin Live Encoder on Akamai vs. AWS?

options.text: Up to 94% lower data transfer out (DTO) costs
options.explain: Akamai's flat egress vs. AWS's per-GB pricing. With OneFootball as a reference, Akamai cites ~90% operational cost reduction.
Encoding still has compute cost — egress is the savings.
Bitmovin claims 2-6x faster transcoding, but the headline number is egress savings.

quiz.question: A customer wants encoder + player + analytics from one vendor on Akamai. Which QCP fits?

options.explain: Ateme is best-of-breed encoding but not a player/analytics one-stop.

options.text: Bitmovin — Live + VOD Encoder + Player + Analytics natively on Akamai
options.explain: Bitmovin is the QCP for the full software stack from one vendor.
